column13: Source stage of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program. This repeatable stage records the documentation sources from which a cancer case has been notified to the registry. Each source represents a piece of documentation, such as a hospital record, pathology report, or death certificate, that supports the registration of a specific tumor. Sources are linked to a specific tumor via the Tumor Number.
